creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #8)

Understandable, and I did very much drop the ball here and still feel really bad about letting this sit so long, especially with a very responsive and insightful maintainer, such as Chris. The taglib update, however, has been put on the back burner as I've been simply overwhelmed with my duties on kde@ keeping Qt* and CMake up to snuff, but this update is a step closer.
